text:
In the lush town of Everlost, butterflies whispered tales of forgotten dreams. Oliver loved those tales. One sunny morning, he pursued a mysterious moth. It lead him to an old oak forest.

Inside ancient mosses Growth grew. Oliver found a hidden glade. Feathered friends sang melodies.

He saw Whisper.

The wise owl knew tales of adventures. Whisper wished for adventure.

So, Oliver turned owl feathers into wings. They flew.

Together they roamed. Sometimes wise owl laughed.

They knew magic was everywhere.

They'd dream forevermore.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
